summary: performance issue: Screen freeze, Total cut to black during The player was in a combat encounter on the Nautiloid during the tutorial phase and performed a spell action.
game_context: The player was in a combat encounter on the Nautiloid during the tutorial phase and performed a spell action.
evidence: Scene: During tutorial combat on the Nautiloid after casting the spell 'Vicious Mockery' on an enemy.
Quote: And my game crashed. Dope.

summary: gameplay logic issue: visible issue during The player opens the character sheet and hovers over the Strength attribute while the 'Club of Hill Giant Strength' is equipped.
game_context: The player opens the character sheet and hovers over the Strength attribute while the 'Club of Hill Giant Strength' is equipped.
evidence: Scene: Character equipment and attribute screen inspecting the 'Club of Hill Giant Strength'.
Quote: Hill Giants have 21 STR, this is a club of Werebear STR (they have 19 STR)
Quote: It's really annoying that it doesn't give you Hill Giant strength but whatever.

summary: physics issue: Sudden model disappearance, Targeting frame remaining without a visible model during The player triggers the forge hammer while the boss, Grym, is positioned on the central anvil.
game_context: The player triggers the forge hammer while the boss, Grym, is positioned on the central anvil.
evidence: Targeting frame remaining without a visible model
Scene: During the Grym boss fight at the Adamantine Forge.
Quote: He just fucking disappeared when I hit the switch.
Quote: Larian for the love of all that is holy, fix your game please.
